subject: LU-3319 procfs: move mdd/ofd proc handling to seq_files

values.-1: I would prefer that you didn't submit this
values.+1: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

Patch Set 16: Code-Review+1

This patch has a high likelihood of conflicting with Fan Yong's patch series starting at http://review.whamcloud.com/10030 which is fixing a number of bugs, and the first four patches are now ready to land.

Please don't land this patch before those ones.

Patch Set 16:

Good news Andreas. This patch didn't collide with the lfsck fixes.It should be safe to land now.
Patch Set 16: Code-Review+1

Patch Set 16: Verified-1 Code-Review-1

Thre appears to be some regression introduced by this patch.

I get a crash shutting down ost (e.g. sanity test 27z or many of the recovery/replay tests) 100% of time when build with DEBUG PAGEALLOC. So it's some sort of use after free:

parents.subject: LU-3319 procfs: update zfs proc handling to seq_files

commit.subject: LU-3319 procfs: move mdd/ofd proc handling to seq_files
commit.message:
LU-3319 procfs: move mdd/ofd proc handling to seq_files

With 3.10 linux kernel and above proc handling now only
uses struct seq_files. This patch migrates the mdd/ofd
layer proc entries over to using seq_files.

Signed-off-by: James Simmons <uja.ornl@gmail.com>
Change-Id: I61b7df6bfd5efd0f12e3ca1a1813b7b62d493168
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/8049
